2604.08461.title: OVS-DINO: Open-Vocabulary Segmentation via Structure-Aligned SAM-DINO with Language Guidance
2604.08461.paper_summary: Open-Vocabulary Segmentation (OVS) aims to segment image regions beyond predefined category sets by leveraging semantic descriptions. While CLIP based approaches excel in semantic generalization, they frequently lack the fine-grained spatial awareness required for dense prediction. Recent efforts have incorporated Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) like DINO to alleviate these limitations. However, these methods still struggle with the precise edge perception necessary for high fidelity segmentation. In this paper, we analyze internal representations of DINO and discover that its inherent boundary awareness is not absent but rather undergoes progressive attenuation as features transition into deeper transformer blocks. To address this, we propose OVS-DINO, a novel framework that revitalizes latent edge-sensitivity of DINO through structural alignment with the Segment Anything Model (SAM). Specifically, we introduce a Structure-Aware Encoder (SAE) and a Structure-Modulated Decoder (SMD) to effectively activate boundary features of DINO using SAM's structural priors, complemented by a supervision strategy utilizing SAM generated pseudo-masks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple weakly-supervised OVS benchmarks, improving the average score by 2.1% (from 44.8% to 46.9%). Notably, our approach significantly enhances segmentation accuracy in complex, cluttered scenarios, with a gain of 6.3% on Cityscapes (from 36.6% to 42.9%).
2604.08461.paper_summary_zh: 開放詞彙分割 (OVS) 旨在利用語義描述對超出預定類別集的圖像區域進行分割。雖然基於 CLIP 的方法在語義泛化方面表現優異，但它們經常缺乏進行密集預測所需的細粒度空間感知。最近的努力已經整合了如 DINO 的視覺基礎模型 (VFM) 來緩解這些限制。然而，這些方法仍然在高保真分割所需的精確邊緣感知上存在困難。在本文中，我們分析了 DINO 的內部表示，發現其固有的邊界感知並非缺失，而是隨著特徵過渡到更深的Transformer區塊而逐漸減弱。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了 OVS-DINO，一個通過與任務模型 (SAM) 的結構對齊來重振 DINO 潛在邊緣敏感性的全新框架。具體而言，我們引入了一個結構感知編碼器 (SAE) 和一個結構調制解碼器 (SMD)，以有效激活 DINO 的邊界特徵，利用 SAM 的結構先驗，並輔以利用 SAM 生成的偽掩碼的監督策略。大量實驗表明，我們的方法在多個弱監督 OVS 基準上達到了最先進的性能，平均得分提高了 2.1%（從 44.8% 提升至 46.9%）。值得注意的是，我們的方法在複雜、雜亂的場景中顯著提高了分割準確性，在 Cityscapes 上增益達 6.3%（從 36.6% 提升至 42.9%）。
2604.08461.author: Haoxi Zeng et.al.
2604.08461.authors: Haoxi Zeng, Qiankun Liu, Yi Bin, Haiyue Zhang, Yujuan Ding, Guoqing Wang, Deqiang Ouyang, Heng Tao Shen
